command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000), @baseCurrency varchar(32) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @message = 'this._baseCurrency=''' + @baseCurrency + ''';loadForm(this);' if @@view = 0 begin if @@action = 'Edit' begin declare @$checkVoucherUnit varchar(32), @$lockedDate nvarchar(512) select @$checkVoucherUnit = b.ma_dvcs from @@table a join &ToolAndSupplyTable; b on a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc where a.ma_dc = @ma_dc if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @$checkVoucherUnit and r_edit = 1) begin select @message as script, '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end select @$lockedDate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày giới hạn hoặc ngày khóa sổ.' else N'Data is locked, you must modify system locked date.' end if exists(select 1 from dmdvcsks where ma_dvcs = @$checkVoucherUnit and ngay_ks >= dateadd(m, 1, cast(str(@nam, 4) + replace(str(@ky, 2), ' ', '0') + '01' as smalldatetime)) - 1) begin select 'ky' as field, @$lockedDate as message return end end end select @message as message return
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and ma_bp_dc = @ma_bp_dc and ma_dc = @ma_dc
